card.base: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#222222] rounded-sm p-6 flex flex-col h-full

button.primary: bg-white text-black font-semibold rounded-sm px-6 py-2 hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors
button.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#222222] text-white rounded-sm px-6 py-2 hover:bg-[#141414] transition-colors
button.danger: bg-[#FF3B30]/10 text-[#FF3B30] border border-[#FF3B30]/20 rounded-sm px-6 py-2 hover:bg-[#FF3B30]/20 transition-colors

badge.critical: bg-[#FF3B30]/10 text-[#FF3B30] border border-[#FF3B30]/20 font-mono text-xs px-2 py-0.5 uppercase tracking-wider
badge.high: bg-[#FF9500]/10 text-[#FF9500] border border-[#FF9500]/20 font-mono text-xs px-2 py-0.5 uppercase tracking-wider
badge.medium: bg-[#FFCC00]/10 text-[#FFCC00] border border-[#FFCC00]/20 font-mono text-xs px-2 py-0.5 uppercase tracking-wider
badge.low: bg-[#34C759]/10 text-[#34C759] border border-[#34C759]/20 font-mono text-xs px-2 py-0.5 uppercase tracking-wider

table.header: border-b border-[#222222] text-[#A1A1AA] font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-wider py-3

images.description: Dark server rack background to be used with a heavy black overlay (e.g., bg-black/80) on the 'Run Scan' page during scanning.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use Phosphor Icons: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react
Install and use Recharts for data visualizations: yarn add recharts. Ensure charts use the defined severity colors for data segments and have a transparent background with #222222 grid lines.
Implement 'The Control Room Grid' layout pattern. Ensure the layout utilizes the full width and height where appropriate, keeping a dense, data-rich feel without empty gaps.
Borders are critical. Do not use shadows for elevation. Use 1px #222222 borders to define sections and cards.
For the Findings Table, implement an expandable row mechanism. Include data-testid attributes on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='expand-row-button', data-testid='start-scan-button').
For the Run Scan page, when the scan is active, use the 'scan_progress_background' image with a heavy backdrop blur and bg-black/80 overlay to create an immersive focus state.
Text contrast is paramount. Only use the defined severity colors on text or borders; do not use them as solid background fills to maintain a professional, un-gamified look.
Use custom scrollbars to remove gutters: Webkit scrollbar styling with dark tracks and slightly lighter thumbs.

accessibility_and_motion.hover_states: All buttons and table rows must explicitly define hover colors. E.g., hover:bg-[#141414].
accessibility_and_motion.focus_states: Focus states must use ring-1 ring-white/50 ring-offset-2 ring-offset-black.
accessibility_and_motion.motion: Use minimal motion. Stick to fast opacity transitions (duration-150) for hover states, and smooth ease-in-out for progress bars. No bouncy animations.
